request.prompt:
Use case: social teaser clip
Primary request: A tabletop workflow sequence with three cards labeled PLAN, GENERATE, and REFINE.
Scene/background: dark matte desk in a minimalist studio with subtle haze
Subject: three white paper cards with bold sans-serif labels
Action: card one glows, card two flips in, card three settles; one beat per second
Camera: top-down 35mm with a very gentle push-in
Lighting/mood: soft overhead key with cool rim light
Color palette: charcoal, electric blue, warm amber
Style/format: clean motion-graphics realism
Timing/beats: 0-1.3s PLAN glows, 1.3-2.6s GENERATE flips, 2.6-4s REFINE settles
Constraints: under-18 friendly, no people, no logos
Avoid: avoid flicker, jitter, warped text, and fast motion
